dialogues: Check this out. Remember reading graphs with scales? Here's a graph with a scale of 10. That row has 3 symbols. 3 symbols, each worth 10. That's 3 groups of 10. You've been doing this all along. Reading graph scales was multiplication. Now find the product of 3 times 10. Place the tile.
Right. 3 times 10 equals 30. Ends in zero so it matches the multiples of 10s pattern. The graph shows 30 items in that category. Same math you just learned.
